name: Can my boss fire me for filing a workers comp claim after I hurt my back lifting?
description: No, it is illegal to fire an employee in Utah or Idaho just for filing a workers comp claim. While you can be let go if you can no longer perform the job duties

mainEntity.name: Can my boss fire me for filing a workers comp claim after I hurt my back lifting?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, it is illegal to fire an employee in Utah or Idaho just for filing a workers comp claim. While you can be let go if you can no longer perform the job duties, retaliatory firing for seeking benefits is prohibited and may lead to a wrongful termination lawsuit.
